hero.text: Professional welding and metal construction services built around quality and long-term durability.

about.label: About Us
about.title: We deliver complete metal fabrication and installation services.
about.text: MTF Group has more than a decade of practical experience in welding, locksmith works, and structural metal construction projects across industrial and commercial sites.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.text: Skilled team for demanding industrial jobs.

quality.title: Quality
quality.text: Reliable workmanship with strict quality control.

services.label: Services

welding.title: Welding
welding.description: Professional welding services for various types of metals, ensuring precision and long-lasting joint strength.
welding.longText: Professional welding services for all types of metals, with maximum precision and long-lasting joint strength. We use modern techniques and equipment to ensure quality that meets even the most demanding projects. Our team has experience on industrial, construction, and specialized structures where safety and reliability are essential.

metalwork.title: Locksmith Work
metalwork.description: Fabrication, installation, and repair of metal elements such as fences, gates, and security systems.
metalwork.longText: We provide complete locksmith services — from concept and fabrication to installation and maintenance. We specialize in producing functional and aesthetically refined metal elements tailored to your needs. Whether the project is simple or complex, we guarantee precision, durability, and safety.
bullets: Repairs and refinements of existing elements

steel.title: Metal Constructions
steel.description: Production and assembly of steel and metal structures for residential, industrial, and commercial projects.
steel.longText: We design and manufacture steel and metal structures for various purposes — from residential to industrial and commercial facilities. Every project is delivered with strict compliance to technical standards, focused on stability, durability, and safety. Our approach combines quality fabrication, precise planning, and efficient execution.

assembly.title: Assembly
assembly.description: Fast and reliable on-site assembly of all types of metal structures and components.
assembly.longText: We provide professional on-site assembly of all types of metal structures and elements, with maximum efficiency and safety. Our team ensures fast and precise installation while respecting deadlines and the highest execution standards. Regardless of project complexity, we guarantee reliable delivery from start to finish.

services.pageText: Contact us for a detailed quote, technical consultation, and an execution plan tailored to your project.

footer.copy: Quality metal construction solutions for industry and infrastructure.
